features: 【Compatible Models】: For 40 mm Apple Watch se 3rd generation(2025),se 2nd generation(2024), se 1st generation, Series 6,Series 5,Series 4 40mm smartwatch only! Please double check your watch size before purchasing.
【Included in the Package】: 6 pieces of high performance hard PC case for iwatch se 3rd gen,se 2nd gen,se 1st gen,Series 6,Series 5,Series 4 40 mm + 6 pieces of wet and dry wipes.

【Easy To Install and Disassembly】: Very easy to install and remove, no need to remove you apple watch band. High light transmittance, clear and smooth surface, can bring you the touch feeling of the original apple watch screen.

【Full Protection】: The hard pc bumper comes with an slim, clear tempered glass screen protector that covers both the screen and the edges, providing 360-degree protection from scratches, bumps, and accidental drops.

【High Sensitive Touch】: High transparency tempered glass screen protector, presenting the original clear picture quality and high speed response. Slim design protective cover, high quality touch. Match with different color apple watch straps to make your apple watch stand out!
